title: Best of Knysna Readers Choice Awards - nominate your favourites!
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Best of Knysna...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Best of Knysna Readers' Choice Awards are landing soon, and we need you to help us shine the spotlight on all the local legends that make our town amazing!","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Best of Knysna Readers' Choice Awards are landing soon, and we need you to help us shine the spotlight on all the local legends that make our town amazing!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Starting 1 May, we’re throwing open the doors for nominations.","html":"Starting 1 May, we’re throwing open the doors for nominations."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"That means it's your chance to shout out your go-to coffee shop, the hair salon that gives you life, the best weekend getaway spot, and even the DIY wizard who can fix literally anything."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Got a favourite business that deserves the gold-star treatment? Know a beauty spot that makes you feel like royalty? Obsessed with a restaurant you recommend to everyone?","html":"Got a favourite business that deserves the gold-star treatment? Know a beauty spot that makes you feel like royalty? Obsessed with a restaurant you recommend to everyone?"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Now's the time to make it official.","html":"Now's the time to make it official."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Here’s how it works:"},{"type":"list","items":["You nominate.","The town votes.","The winners get crowned Knysna royalty. (And yes, you might even snag some sweet prizes just for taking part!)"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The best part? It's totally free to nominate and vote. No red tape. No secret committees. Just the people of Knysna lifting each other up.","html":"The best part? It's totally free to nominate and vote. No red tape. No secret committees. Just the people of Knysna lifting each other up."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Brought to you by Knysna-Plett Herald, this is our way of celebrating the heart, hustle and flavour that make Knysna Knysna. So keep an eye on www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/knysna-plett/ and follow Knysna-Plett Herald on Facebook for all the juicy updates.","html":"Brought to you by Knysna-Plett Herald, this is our way of celebrating the heart, hustle and flavour that make Knysna Knysna. So keep an eye on www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/knysna-plett/ and follow Knysna-Plett Herald on Facebook for all the juicy updates."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Let’s make some noise for our local legends and turn this town into a celebration zone!","html":"Let’s make some noise for our local legends and turn this town into a celebration zone!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ready, set… nominate!","html":"Ready, set… nominate!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Nominations are now open! Click here to nominate your favorite businesses today!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nominations close 15 May 2025","html":"Nominations close 15 May 2025"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
